qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: The following function computes for positive integers and . int exp (int X, int Y) { int res =1, a = X, b = Y; while (b != 0) { if (b % 2 == 0) {a = a * a; b = b/2; } else {res = res * a; b = b - 1; } } return res; } Which one of the following conditions is TRUE before every iteration of the loop?

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the C program fragment below which is meant to divide by using repeated subtractions. The variables , , and are all unsigned int. while (r >= y) { r=r-y; q=q+1; }
